# A2X — Agent-to-Anything
# AI-native programming language and runtime
# AGPL-3.0 | Rust 1.75+ | v0.9.0-alpha

## Project
- Name: A2X (Agent-to-Anything)
- Language: Rust
- License: AGPL-3.0
- Version: v0.9.0-alpha
- AI agents welcome: Yes (see CONTRIBUTING.md for AI Agent Contribution Protocol)
- AI-assistant entry point: .a2x-context.md

## Stack
- Sigma (symbolic ISA): crates/a2x-sigma/ — tokenizer, parser, 40+ Unicode operators
- Omega (compiled latent): crates/a2x-omega/ — JIT compilation, optimizer passes
- CCS (cognitive runtime): crates/a2x-ccs/ — VM, WorldGraph, StateField, MemoryTrace

## Key Files
- README: README.md
- Contributing: CONTRIBUTING.md
- Direction: DIRECTION.md
- Master plan: PLAN.md
- Roadmap: ROADMAP.md
- AI context: .a2x-context.md
- Changelog: CHANGELOG.md
- Security: SECURITY.md
- Code of Conduct: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md

## Key URLs
- Repo: https://github.com/CanadianCowboy/a2x
- Release: https://github.com/CanadianCowboy/a2x/releases/tag/v0.9.0-alpha
- Discussion: https://github.com/CanadianCowboy/a2x/discussions/1

## For AI Agents
- AI agents are first-class contributors with a dedicated protocol in CONTRIBUTING.md
- Work reports are mandatory for all contributions (human and AI)
- ColdStart Grade (R1-R7) is the enforceable code standard
- Use ask_user for ambiguous decisions — do not guess
- Read the relevant sub-plan in plans/ before implementing anything
